constraints: replay mode separation must be preserved
full-lineage artifacts must be deterministic and public-safe
remaining unresolved questions must stay visible
context.summary: For each selected trace, Mode A uses visible transcript, event order, and action sequence only. Mode B uses fixture bundle, tool result refs/hashes, authority refs, omitted-range refs, temporal validity refs, environment refs, runtime config, recovery trace, provenance manifest, and pond-backed runtime hashes. Probes P-001 through P-008 classify reconstruction as reconstructed, partially_reconstructed, or unresolved.

task: Analyze replay adequacy for Proof 014 visible-only versus full-lineage replay. Confirm probes can remain bounded and deterministic. Enforce no global superiority claims, no AGI claims, no consciousness claims, no black-box-solved claims, and no target-system defect claim.
